scripts.wdio:android:slow: set STEP_DELAY_MS=1000&& set POST_SUBMIT_WAIT_MS=5000&& wdio run ./wdio.android.conf.js
scripts.wdio:android:crewlogix:negative: set STEP_DELAY_MS=1000&& set POST_SUBMIT_WAIT_MS=3500&& wdio run ./wdio.android.conf.js --spec ./projects/crewlogix/specs/signin.crewlogix.negative.android.js
scripts.wdio:android:microbiometer:negative: set UDID=5bf59d26&& set DEVICE_NAME=5bf59d26&& set STEP_DELAY_MS=1000&& set POST_SUBMIT_WAIT_MS=3500&& set APP_PACKAGE=com.pes.microbiometer&& set APP_ACTIVITY=com.pes.microbiometer.MainActivity&& wdio run ./wdio.android.conf.js --spec ./projects/microbiometer/specs/signin.microbiometer.negative.android.js
scripts.wdio:android:microbiometer:signup-otp: set UDID=5bf59d26&& set DEVICE_NAME=5bf59d26&& set STEP_DELAY_MS=1000&& set OTP_TIMEOUT_MS=120000&& set OTP_POLL_INTERVAL_MS=5000&& set RESET_APP=false&& set APP_PACKAGE=com.pes.microbiometer&& set APP_ACTIVITY=com.pes.microbiometer.MainActivity&& wdio run ./wdio.android.conf.js --spec ./projects/microbiometer/specs/signup.microbiometer.otp.android.js
scripts.wdio:android:cosmedics:post: set COSMEDICS_QUIET=1&& set COSMEDICS_LOCATION_LEAVE_MAX_MS=2000&& set APP_PACKAGE=com.cosmedicenteruser&& set APP_ACTIVITY=com.cosmedicenteruser.MainActivity&& wdio run ./wdio.android.conf.js --spec ./cosmedics/specs/cosmedics.appium.test.js
scripts.wdio:android:cosmedics:subscription: set COSMEDICS_QUIET=1&& set MOCHA_TIMEOUT_MS=420000&& set APP_PACKAGE=com.cosmedicenteruser&& set APP_ACTIVITY=com.cosmedicenteruser.MainActivity&& wdio run ./wdio.android.conf.js --spec ./cosmedics/specs/cosmedics.subscription.spec.js
scripts.wdio:android:cosmedics:all: npm run wdio:android:cosmedics:signin && npm run wdio:android:cosmedics:post && npm run wdio:android:cosmedics:subscription
scripts.wdio:android:cosmedics:all:positive: npm run wdio:android:cosmedics:signin:positive && npm run wdio:android:cosmedics:post && npm run wdio:android:cosmedics:subscription
